layer_F_ck.interpretation: CK coherence IS inverse temperature of thought-selection system. T*=5/7 is the grammar/thermal crossover. BTQ kernel = grammar-forced mode selector at 50Hz. verdict: Layer E: σ* beyond sweep range — grammar extremely jitter-robust
